parents.subject: LU-13456 ldlm: fix reprocessing of locks with more bits

commit.subject: LU-9272 tests: check mgs failover
commit.message:
LU-9272 tests: check mgs failover

Adds test conf-sanity 121. For testing only.

Test-Parameters: trivial failover=true osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R iscsi=1 env=CONF_SANITY_EXCEPT="24a" testlist=conf-sanity,recovery-mds-scale,recovery-random-scale
Signed-off-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ib4d9da0e101510bb708b96bd47b5a3205342f058
